title: Imperial Venus
writer: Rodolphe-Maurice Arlaud, Jean Aurenche, Leonardo Benvenuti
actors: Gina Lollobrigida, Stephen Boyd, Raymond Pellegrin
plot: This loose biopic relates the adult life of Paolina (Paulette), the sister of Napoleon Bonaparte. She is portrayed as a willful, yet impulsive woman, through her marriages and scandals, through the heights and depths of Napoleon's...
